IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: Enriching the lives of older adults and people with disabilities by fostering networks of support, advocating for individual choice, collaborating with others, ensuring equity, and striving to do so with conviction.
IRS990.MissionDesc: Enriching the lives of older adults and people with disabilities by fostering networks of support, advocating for individual choice, collaborating with others, ensuring equity, and striving to do so with conviction.
IRS990.Desc: Nutrition Services to the elderly-congregate and home delivered nutrition programs in a seven county area.

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: Social Services to the elderly for transportation, info and assistance, case management, home repairs, legal and other community and health services in a seven county area.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: The Agency is a nonprofit organization exempt from Federal and State Income Taxes under the Internal Revenue Code (IRC) section 501(C)(3).

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Grantmaker's Description of How Grants are Used
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE AGENCY CONDUCTS FISCAL AND PROGRAM MONITORING OF ALL SERVICE PROVIDERS INCLUDING DESK REVIEWS, ON-SITE MONITORING AND REVIEW OF ANNUAL AUDITED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS SUBMITTED BY THE PROVIDERS. IN ADDITION, AS PART OF THE AGENCY'S ANNUAL FINANCIAL REPORTING REQUIREMENTS, ITS MONITORING PROCEDURES ARE REVIEWED BY AN INDEPENDENT AUDITOR FOR COMPLIANCE WITH VARIOUS FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 11b
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: A DRAFT COPY OF THE 990 IS PROVIDED TO THE GOVERNING BOARD AND DISCUSSED AT A BOARD MEETING PRIOR TO BEING FILED WITH THE IRS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 12c
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: IF ANY ISSUE COMES UP WHERE THERE IS A POTENTIAL CONFLICT, IT IS BROUGHT TO THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS' ATTENTION. THE EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR IS RESPONSIBLE FOR REVIEWING THE MATTER AND MAY TAKE APPROPRIATE ACTION IF NECESSARY TO PROTECT THE INTERESTS OF THE ORGANIZATION.ANNUALLY, THE OFFICE ADMINISTRATOR COLLECTS AND FILES EACH MEMBER'S CONFLICT OF INTEREST FORM 700.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 15a
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR HAS AN ANNUAL REVIEW CONDUCTED BY THE EXECUTIVE COMMITTEE OF THE GOVERNING BOARD. KEY EMPLOYEES ARE EVALUATED ANNUALLY BY THEIR SUPERVISOR.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section C, Line 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, POLICIES, AND FINANCIAL STATEMENTS OF THE AGENCY ARE AVAILABLE UPON REQUEST AT THE AGENCY'S CORPORATE OFFICES.
The organization has engaged a public accounting firm to conduct the audit for FYE 6/30/2024, but it hasn't commenced yet due to needing to finish the FYE 6/30/2023 audits.
